title: Spacehunter: Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
original_title: Spacehunter: Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
overview: On a distant planet inhabited by mutants, two bounty hunters race to rescue three Earth female captives from the clutches of an evil warlord.
